visual enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E5E7EB for cards to prevent floating syndrome

grids.bento_strategy_rn: Use flexWrap: 'wrap' with percentage widths (48% for half, 100% for full) and generous margins (margin: 16) to emulate the Bento grid in React Native.

layouts.onboarding: Full screen layout. Large aesthetic hero image at top, soft rounded card sheet at bottom for form. Fields: Name, Email, Phone, Age. Large pill-shaped green submit button.
layouts.settings_tab: 5th bottom tab. Minimalist profile header (view-only), Settings List (Reminders toggle + Time picker), Export actions (PDF/CSV). Cardless list style with right chevrons.
layouts.insights_enhanced: Sticky month selector at the top. Total Spend massive number. Budget Progress bar (Green vs Red). Category breakdown bento cards. Horizontal scroll for weekly bar chart.

motion.toggles: Smooth switch animation using built-in React Native Switch or Reanimated.
motion.page_transitions: Expo Router default native stack transitions (slide from right).

accessibility.general: Use accessibilityLabel, accessibilityRole, and accessible={true} on all interactive elements.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure green text over white or white over green meets 4.5:1 ratio. (Use #059669 for text if needed).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a testID attribute. Use kebab-case.

media.images: Use fast-loading remote images or local assets with priority.

3d libraries.reason: Minimal performance-focused student mobile app. Avoid heavy 3D.

image_urls.description: Minimalist stationery aesthetic for the onboarding welcome screen background.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. ARCHITECTURE: Extend Expo Router. In the root layout, check AsyncStorage for a saved profile. If null, render the '/onboarding.js' screen. Otherwise, render the main '(tabs)' layout.

2. ONBOARDING: Create '/app/frontend/app/onboarding.js' capturing Name, Email, Phone, and Age with validation. Use a clean, minimal layout with the provided hero image. Save profile to AsyncStorage upon success.
3. SETTINGS & PROFILE: Add a 5th tab 'Settings' in '/app/frontend/app/(tabs)/settings.js'. Display the read-only profile card. Include settings list for Reminders and Export options.

4. REMINDERS: Implement daily reminders using 'expo-notifications'. Allow users to toggle and select a custom time via a modal. On Android/iOS, schedule local notifications with a deep-link payload to the 'Add Expense' screen. On Web, provide a graceful fallback message.

5. INSIGHTS ENHANCEMENT: In '/app/frontend/app/(tabs)/insights.js', add a sticky month selector that auto-generates months based on existing transaction data. Display Total Spend, Remaining Budget, Average Daily Spend, and Highest Category. Use 'react-native-gifted-charts' for the Pie Chart and a horizontal scrolling Bar Chart.

6. EXPORT: In Settings or Insights, add an Export feature. Use 'expo-print' to generate a beautifully styled PDF report containing all transactions and insight summaries for the selected month. Support CSV generation. Use 'expo-sharing' to prompt the native share sheet.

7. UI/UX: Do not break existing flows. Keep the theme primary color #10B981. Ensure containers have non-transparent backgrounds (e.g., solid white). Note: React Native 0.74+ deprecates shadow* props; use 'boxShadow' string style instead (e.g., boxShadow: '0px 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)').
8. FILES: Only write .js files (no .tsx). Add 'testID' (kebab-case) to all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and modern RN boxShadow.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped (borderRadius: 9999) or sharp buttons with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons. Use @expo/vector-icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - use TouchableOpacity's activeOpacity or simple LayoutAnimation.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap. Use padding 24px to 32px for main containers.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a testID attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it. Example: Dropdown or Sticky headers with transparent background.
